title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of wealth, love, and the American Dream in the 1920s.

author: George Orwell
description: A chilling prophecy about the future of a totalitarian state.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins leaves his quiet home for an epic quest to reclaim treasure.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: The story of young Scout Finch and her father's fight against racial injustice.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut must save the Earth from an extinction-level threat.

title: The Catcher in the Rye
author: J.D. Salinger
description: Holden Caulfield navigates the complexities of teenage angst and alienation.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A young woman leaves her survivalist family to pursue academic success.

title: The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo
author: Taylor Jenkins Reid
description: An aging Hollywood icon recounts her scandalous and glamorous life.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A woman shoots her husband and never speaks another word.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, Dune is the story of the boy Paul Atreides, who will become the mysterious man known as Muad'Dib.
